en: Do you want to build a snowman It doesn't have to be a snowman Alright
ko: 눈사람 만들래? 꼭 눈사람 아니어도 돼, 알았어

ko: 눈사람 만들래? 아니면 복도에서 자전거 탈래?

en: think some company's overdue I've started talking to the pictures on the walls Hang in there Joan

en: It gets a little lonely all these empty rooms Just watching the hours tick by
